name: 5'x7' Floral Handtufted Area Rug Dark Green - Threshold™
description:
Give your flooring a sophisticated update with this Floral Handtufted Area Rug from Threshold™. This rectangular hand-tufted area rug showcases a floral pattern in green hues for a charming look that blends well with any decor aesthetic. Featuring a wool construction for soft underfoot comfort, the rug also has a low-pile construction, making it perfect for high-traffic areas like your living room or entryway.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
